articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: Five Eyes security alliance warns of Chinese spy threat on job sites - NBC News
articles.description: China is targeting personnel linked to the English-speaking Five Eyes intelligence-sharing alliance — Australia, Canada, New Zealand, the U.K and the U.S. — on job websites to get access to classified or sensitive information, the group said Wednesday
